_README: Admin-seeded places loaded by `python -m backend.tests.seed` into the Place table.
All entries are inserted with status='admin' (always eligible for /pick).
BEFORE THE DEMO: an admin should review every entry below and:
1. Verify the name is exactly as the place calls itself
3. Tighten the lat/lon (rough approximations only — use Google Maps to refine)
4. Update or remove the description (Role 5 should give voice feedback)
5. Add real opening hours if known
Add or remove entries freely. The file is just JSON, the seed script reads it whole.
Categories must be one of: cafe, park, museum, bar, restaurant, viewpoint
City should match exactly the value the frontend sends in /pick (e.g. 'Iași' with diacritics).

places.name: Cafeneaua Piața Unirii
places.description: Central, easy to find, dependable espresso and a wide terrace.

places.name: Meron Coffee
places.description: Specialty coffee chain favorite — good wifi, comfortable seating, study-friendly.

places.name: Origo Coffee Shop
places.description: Cozy, indie, third-wave coffee. Sit upstairs for the quiet spot.

places.name: French Bakery
places.description: Pastries plus solid coffee — pair a croissant with a long black.

places.name: Cafenea de Anticariat
places.description: Books-and-coffee bookstore café — perfect rainy afternoon spot.

places.name: Parcul Copou
places.description: Iași's classic park — Eminescu's linden tree and quiet alleys.

places.name: Grădina Botanică Anastasie Fătu
places.description: The oldest botanical garden in Romania. Bigger than you think — bring snacks.

places.name: Parcul Expoziției
places.description: Open green near Copou — good for a quick break between classes.

places.name: Parcul Palatul Culturii
places.description: Lawn around the Palace — golden-hour photos guaranteed.

places.name: Parcul Mihai Eminescu
places.description: Small, calm, near the university — locals' favorite for reading.

places.name: Palatul Culturii — Muzeul Național al Moldovei
places.description: The big one. Four museums in one building. Plan two hours minimum.

places.name: Muzeul Unirii
places.description: Compact history museum in Cuza's former residence — focused and engaging.

places.name: Muzeul Mihai Eminescu
places.description: In Copou park, dedicated to Romania's national poet — best paired with a park walk.

places.name: Muzeul Literaturii Române
places.description: Beautiful 19th-century house, exhibits on Junimea and Iași's literary scene.

places.name: Muzeul de Istorie Naturală
places.description: The first natural history museum in Romania — fossils, dioramas, taxidermy.

places.name: Beraria Old Nick
places.description: Classic beer hall. Local lagers on tap, hearty food, big tables.

places.name: Underground 13
places.description: Cellar bar with live music nights — pick a Thursday for the best lineup.

places.name: Macondo
places.description: Latin-themed bar, big cocktail list — louder later in the night.

places.name: Acaju
places.description: Wine bar, slower vibe, good for early evening before dinner.

places.name: Casa Lavric
places.description: Romanian classics done well — get the sarmale, leave room for papanași.

places.name: Cuib
places.description: Strictly vegan, surprisingly hearty. Even meat eaters leave happy.

places.name: Restaurant 6
places.description: Modern Romanian, intimate setting, good for a dinner that matters.

places.name: Pucanini
places.description: Pasta done right by Italians. Order the cacio e pepe.

places.name: Trei Iezi
places.description: Grilled meats and beer garden — affordable, casual, big portions.

places.name: Mănăstirea Cetățuia
places.description: Hilltop monastery with the city's best panorama — go at sunset.

places.name: Mănăstirea Galata
places.description: Old fortified monastery on a hill — quieter than Cetățuia, same kind of view.

places.name: Dealul Bucium
places.description: Vineyard-covered hill south of the city — walk up for the view, walk down through wine country.

places.name: Turnul Palatului Culturii
places.description: Climb the Palace tower for a downtown view — combine with the museum ticket.

places.name: Dealul Repedea
places.description: Forest reserve south of the city — wide view, fewer tourists, real quiet.
